label: Reconstruction objectives

node.label: Reconstruction objectives
node.definition: An encoder or latent representation is trained to preserve enough information to rebuild an input.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, Reconstruction objectives is modeled as depending on Unsupervised learning, Generative modeling and feeding downstream nodes such as Autoencoders, VQ-VAE & learned discrete tokenizers.
examples: atlas downstream link to VQ-VAE & learned discrete tokenizers
limitations: A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Unsupervised learning, Generative modeling.

sentence_units.text: An encoder or latent representation is trained to preserve enough information to rebuild an input.

In this atlas graph, Reconstruction objectives is modeled as depending on Unsupervised learning, Generative modeling and feeding downstream nodes such as Autoencoders, VQ-VAE & learned discrete tokenizers.

A tractable objective is a surrogate, so optimizing it can improve the score while leaving the intended behavior unchanged or worse. Its direct dependencies include Unsupervised learning, Generative modeling.
